purpose: v2 fallback probe authorised by v1 §Acceptance — confirm whether 2026-05-18 tense/aspect cluster failure (43%, foundation-suspect band) is at B2-level (perfect aspect itself, backshift, PPC) or at B1-level (past simple form, basic PS-vs-PP, PS-vs-past-continuous, time markers, used-to, stative). Hypothesis from v1 results: B2 — past simple was handled cleanly throughout v1.
protocol: Single sitting, batched 6 per turn, no in-session feedback, no item-target labels in presentation (per 2026-05-18 feedback memory). 50/50 recognition/production. Themes: biz_oil | leisure_sport | brit_expat | claude_collab.

items.stem: Last Saturday I ___ 80 km on the new route round Janabiya.
We ___ a new compliance officer last month.
She ___ for the regulator since 2020 — that's how she knows everyone there.
When the fire alarm went off, I ___ in the boardroom with Bessy.

items.ru: Я отправил черновик контракта вчера вечером.
items.target_en: I sent the draft contract yesterday evening / last night.

items.ru: Когда позвонил клиент, я ехал на велосипеде.
items.target_en: When the client called, I was cycling / riding.

items.stem: I haven't ridden with Adam ___ Tuesday — he's been ill.
I ___ what you mean about the regulator's tone — she's really lost patience.
I ___ ride the seafront route every morning, but I've switched to the desert track now.

items.ru: Мы выбрали другого подрядчика в прошлом месяце.
items.target_en: We chose / picked / selected a different contractor last month.

items.ru: Я раньше каждое утро ездил на велосипеде на работу.
items.target_en: I used to cycle / ride my bike to work every morning.

items.ru: К пятнице мы согласовали с регулятором финальные условия.
items.target_en: By Friday we'd agreed (the) final terms with the regulator. (past simple 'we agreed' also acceptable at B1)
items.notes: Bridges B1 substrate to B2 — past perfect with simple structural demand (had + V-ed). v1 past perfect failures (items 19, 34) were malformed ('had been already left' / 'have been already covered') — passive/intransitive interaction. This v2 item tests past perfect form WITHOUT that compound interference.
